title: Coast Guard Museum Northwest (Seattle) - Visitor Information & Reviews
content: # Coast Guard Museum Northwest. * View best museums in **Seattle**. ## Coast Guard Museum Northwest and its collection. The Coast Guard Museum Northwest is situated on the property of Coast Guard Station Seattle. The museum's location offers visitors a unique opportunity to explore the rich history of the United States Coast Guard in the Pacific Northwest while enjoying the beautiful waterfront views. The Coast Guard Museum Northwest provides a comprehensive overview of the various roles of the Coast Guard. ### Admission to the Coast Guard Museum Northwest. One of the appealing aspects of the Coast Guard Museum Northwest is that admission is free of charge. This allows visitors to explore the museum's extensive collection and learn about the Coast Guard's history in the Pacific Northwest without any financial constraints. ### Images of Coast Guard Museum Northwest. The Coast Guard Museum Northwest in Seattle offers visitors an informative look into the history and operations of the U.S. Coast Guard.

title: Coast Guard Museum Northwest - All You SHOULD Know Before ...
content: This is a great little museum and the staff is very friendly and knowledgeable. The director is a former Coast Guard Captain who took at good two hours out

title: Coast Guard Museum Northwest : r/uscg - Reddit
content: It was a unique experience with real treasures in a small atmosphere worth the visit. Edit: Maybe call the phone number if they have one listed

title: Coast Guard Museum Northwest Review | Seattle, United States
content: The entrance area sets the tone for a respectful and informative journey, with naval insignia and historical markers that hint at the stories

title: Coast Guard Museum Northwest – Official Website of the US Coast Guard Museum NW in Seattle
content: # Coast Guard Museum Northwest – Official Website of the US Coast Guard Museum NW in Seattle. [Skip to content](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/#content). [![Image 1](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/wp-content/uploads/sites/13/2021/12/uscgmuseumlogo.jpg)](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/). *   [Exhibits](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/exhibits/). *   [Volunteer](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/send-message/). *   [How we roll](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/roll/). *   [Facts & Figures](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/uscg-museum-pacific-northwest-facts-figures/). *   [Base Seattle Command](https://www.dcms.uscg.mil/Our-Organization/Director-of-Operational-Logistics-DOL/Bases/Base-Seattle/Command1/). *   [USCG Historian’s Office](https://www.history.uscg.mil/). *   [Future National Coast Guard Museum](https://www.coastguardmuseum.org/). *   [Coast Guard Heritage Museum (Cape Cod)](https://coastguardheritagemuseum.org/). *   [Columbia River Maritime Museum](https://www.crmm.org/). *   [Join the USCG!](https://www.uscg.mil/Join/). *   [Exhibits](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/exhibits/). *   [Volunteer](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/send-message/). *   [How we roll](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/roll/). *   [Facts & Figures](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/uscg-museum-pacific-northwest-facts-figures/). *   [Base Seattle Command](https://www.dcms.uscg.mil/Our-Organization/Director-of-Operational-Logistics-DOL/Bases/Base-Seattle/Command1/). *   [USCG Historian’s Office](https://www.history.uscg.mil/). *   [Future National Coast Guard Museum](https://www.coastguardmuseum.org/). *   [Coast Guard Heritage Museum (Cape Cod)](https://coastguardheritagemuseum.org/). *   [Columbia River Maritime Museum](https://www.crmm.org/). *   [Join the USCG!](https://www.uscg.mil/Join/). ![Image 2](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/wp-content/uploads/sites/13/2021/12/uscg-museum-nw-3-scaled.jpg). The Coast Guard Museum Northwest opened its doors on August 4, 1976. Please call ahead if you have questions. In January 1942, the Seattle Port of Embarkation began operations here at Piers 36 and 37 where USCG Base Seattle and the museum continue today. ![Image 3](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/wp-content/uploads/sites/13/2021/12/Coast_Guard_Museum_NW_01.jpg). ![Image 4](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/wp-content/uploads/sites/13/2021/12/uscgmuseumnwlogo-150x150.jpg). [Send Message](https://coastguardmuseumseattle.org/send-message/). ##### PLEASE CALL AHEAD OF YOUR VISIT.
